# AllOverIt.Fixture

## Purpose
This package contains a base fixture class with numerous helper methods to assist with scaffolding unit tests.

## Package Metadata
- Project: Source/AllOverIt.Fixture/AllOverIt.Fixture.csproj
- Target frameworks: net10.0;net9.0;net8.0
- Tags: AllOverIt, Utilities, UnitTesting, Fakes, Faking, Mocks, Mocking, Stubs, Stubbing, TDD, BDD, NUnit
- Depends on: AllOverIt
